final_prompt.prompt:
Create a marketing poster (WeChat Official Account article cover) for a fragrance new product launch campaign titled "染秋 - 秋意染染 时光留香".

Style/medium: high-end editorial flat design with refined texture, inspired by luxury fragrance brand visual identity — muted ink-wash tones with tactile paper grain overlay
Composition: centered composition, title text as the dominant visual anchor, generous negative space framing the center, balanced symmetry
Subject: the headline "染秋 - 秋意染染 时光留香" rendered in elegant serif or brush-calligraphy typeface, large and prominent; supported by a subtle fragrance bottle or autumnal botanical motif (dried leaves, osmanthus, reed) as secondary element
Scene/backdrop: abstract warm autumnal background — deep amber, burnt sienna, or muted gold wash suggesting autumn atmosphere
Lighting/mood: soft diffused warm light, no harsh shadows, gentle glow emanating from center, serene and luxurious mood
Color palette: warm amber and burnt gold as dominant tones, off-white or cream for text contrast, one muted accent (dusty rose or sage) to add depth
Materials/textures: subtle paper grain texture, soft ink bleed effect on background, matte finish aesthetic
Text (verbatim): "染秋 - 秋意染染 时光留香"
Constraints: title text must be the most visually dominant element; layout must read clearly as a 900×500 horizontal banner crop; no busy background patterns that compete with the headline
Avoid: neon colors, overly busy illustration, drop shadows that cheapen the look, generic stock-photo autumn leaves, watermark, stuffer aesthetic
